raw_source.title: Exocore 公司诚聘 Full Stack工程师
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍
Founded in 2023, Exogenous, Inc. is a software technology company building Exocore, an omnichain pooled security protocol powering an open market for decentralized trust. Exocore is a blockchain infrastructure that connects to other L1 blockchains to allow restaking of existing staked L1 tokens or LSDs (liquid staking derivatives) to supply token-economic security to off-chain middleware protocols or applications. Restaking is a new category in the industry with huge potential to reshape how security is modeled and utilized by various security-focused applications.

### Core Team
Warren Paul Anderson, Co-founder and CEO [Warren](https://www.linkedin.com/in/warpaul1/) has been working full time in crypto and web3 for ten years. Warren was the CEO of [Discreet Labs](https://discreetlabs.io/) to lead a team of over 80 engineers and operators building scalable privacy systems using zero-knowledge proofs (ZKP) for web3.

Rongjian (”RJ”) Lan, Co-founder and CTO [RJ](https://www.linkedin.com/in/rongjianlan/) has been working full-time in the blockchain space since 2018. Previously, RJ was the Co-founder and CTO of [Harmony](https://www.harmony.one/), where he led the development of the Harmony blockchain, which pioneered the introduction of sharding to PoS networks.

Raluca Ada Popa, Co-founder & Research Advisor [Raluca](https://people.eecs.berkeley.edu/~raluca/) is an Associate Professor of Computer Science at UC Berkeley. Her research focuses on applied cryptography and security systems. Raluca also serves as a Director of [Sky Lab at UC Berkeley,](https://sky.cs.berkeley.edu/) where she leads a research group focused on decentralized trust and security.

## 薪资福利待遇
25K - 60K RMB or equivalent in USD

## 地点
 * 工作地点：杭州
* 联系方式：[mike@exogenous.io](mailto:mike@exogenous.io) (请附上简历, github ID 或者 代码作品）

 ## 工作性质
* 是否全职：是
* 是否远程：可商量

## 岗位要求、职责
### About the Role:
The Full Stack Engineer is responsible for the web application and UI/UX development. Your role will involve creating intuitive and responsive user experiences, integrating blockchain functionality into web services and interfaces. 

You will work with a globally distributed team of top-tier engineers and collaborate with leading researchers in cryptography and blockchain protocols to implement the best web services and UI/UX in a secure and efficient manner.

### Job Description:
* Collaborate with a global engineering team to understand system requirements and design specifications.
* Design and implement secure, responsive, and user-friendly web applications to integrate with the blockchain system, smart contracts, and external APIs, ensuring a seamless and visually appealing user experience.
* Use blockchain/Web3 or related libraries to implement, test, maintain, and upgrade features such as wallet integration, user interaction, and handling blockchain transaction information.
* Implement security best practices to safeguard against potential vulnerabilities and attacks.
* Ensure that the web application and services are compatible with mainstream standards in the blockchain industry.
* Conduct service testing and gather feedback for continuous improvement.


### Job Requirement:
* Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or related majors.
* Ability to write structured and clean code, proficient in front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript/Typescript, and front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, Vue.js.
* 1+ years of experience in building modern blockchain web applications, testing tools, and pipelines.
* Ability to define and deliver production-level safe and scalable frontend architectures.
* Passionate about blockchain technology and a demonstrated ability to learn new technology quickly.
* Ability to work independently, innovate, and strong problem-solving skills.
* Good communication skills in conveying complicated ideas and writing technical documentation.
* Willingness to adapt to new technology or areas of focus quickly.


### Preferred Skills:
* Deep knowledge of blockchain web applications and related front-end technologies.
* Understanding of blockchain-related security considerations in front-end development.

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
comments.author: github-actions[bot]
